page.title: Social · Work Sandbox
page.description: Hand your twin a snippet, run it live, and read the result as a first-class evidence card.

editor.title: Code
editor.subtitle: Write some Python and hit run to see the output.

output.title: Output
output.emptyDescription: Write code on the left and hit Run — the result shows up here as an evidence card.
output.timedOut: Timed out — the sandbox stopped this run.
output.error: The run failed — please try again.

hint.integration: The public run endpoint isn't in the locked API contract yet — it falls back to a typed demo run (echoing print("…") strings) and switches to real execution at integration.
